title: dendranthema yezoense
intro: Dendranthema yezoense, also known as D. yezoensis or Japanese alpine aster, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the mountainous regions of Japan. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Dendranthema yezoense has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting the healing of injuries. In herbal preparations, Dendranthema yezoense is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
